title: Consciousness & Cognitive Science: EML as Model of Thought

key_theorem.statement: Cognitive processes follow the EML depth hierarchy: resting state = EML-1 (synchronized ground state). Attention = EML-1 (softmax = Boltzmann). Working memory capacity = EML-0 (7±2), decay = EML-1, rehearsal = EML-3. Insight = EML-∞ → EML-3 depth transition (like grokking in neural networks). Qualia = EML-∞ hypothesis (irreducible, non-compressible subjective experience). Integrated Information Φ = EML-2 (logarithmic). Psychosis = EML-∞ (disordered thought); deep meditation = EML-2 (structured stillness).

switching.reason: Nearly degenerate Boltzmann = EML-1 near EML-0 limit
Unstable transition state: attention split = EML-∞ (like phase boundary)
New EML-1 ground state after switching

capacity.chunking_insight: Chunking: N items → log_k(N) chunks = EML-2 (logarithmic compression reduces EML-0 count)

sleep_replay.theta_oscillation: 4-8 Hz hippocampal theta: EML-3 (oscillation during REM)
sleep_replay.consolidation: EML-3 replay → EML-2 consolidated trace (depth reduction through sleep)

insight_dynamics.representation: Fixed wrong frame, exhaustive EML-∞ search
insight_dynamics.description: Random search in wrong solution space = EML-∞ (incompressible)
Unconscious diffusion of activation: EML-3 spatial oscillation in neural space
The transition instant itself is EML-∞ (discontinuous reconfiguration)
Problem now has compact EML-3 solution — depth reduced

integrated_information.reason: Φ ≈ n·log(1/(1-c)): EML-2 (logarithm of rational function)
Φ ≈ n·log(1/(1-c)): EML-2 (logarithm of rational function)
Φ ≈ n·log(1/(1-c)): EML-2 (logarithm of rational function)

qualia_hypothesis.hard_problem: Qualia may be EML-∞: no finite EML tree can generate subjective 'redness'

cognitive_phases.key_insight: Healthy cognition oscillates between EML-1 (rest) and EML-3 (active). Pathology = EML-∞ (disorganized) or EML-0 (vegetative). Insight = brief EML-∞ transition enabling EML-3 restructuring.

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Vegetative state; discrete memory capacity 7±2; digit span
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Slow-wave sleep oscillation; attention weights (softmax); memory decay exp(-t/τ)
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Integrated information Φ; chunking compression; beta-wave focused attention
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: REM replay; gamma oscillation NCC; insight post-restructuring; creativity
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Qualia (hard problem); psychosis; attention switching instant; pre-insight impasse

rabbit_hole_log: Attention as Boltzmann: softmax weights are exactly exp(score_i)/Z = EML-1. The brain's attention mechanism computes the same distribution as statistical mechanics ground states. This suggests attention is a physical minimum-energy operation.

Insight = grokking: the EML-∞ → EML-3 transition in Session 96 (modular arithmetic) mirrors the Aha! moment: random search (EML-∞) suddenly finds the compact structure (EML-3). Incubation = background EML-3 diffusion enabling the restructuring.

The hard problem of consciousness: qualia resist EML classification because they're private. From a third-person (external) view, NCCs are EML-3 (measurable oscillations). But the first-person 'what it's like' may genuinely be EML-∞ — not because it's complex, but because no external formula captures it.

connections.to_session_96: Grokking = EML-∞→EML-3. Insight moments follow identical EML depth transition
connections.to_session_57: Phase transitions = EML-∞. Attention switching = cognitive phase transition = EML-∞ at the moment
